page.title: Worlds
page.subtitle: Build a world from its lore — characters, places, factions — with no manuscript required.

empty.title: No worlds yet
empty.description: Create your first world to start authoring lore — no chapters needed.

create.title: New world
create.description: Name your world. You can author its lore right away.

lore.title: World bible
lore.extractionOptional: Author lore directly — characters, places, factions. No manuscript needed. Extraction from prose is optional; this world bible is the anchor.
lore.anchorUnavailable: This world has no bible anchor yet — lore authoring is unavailable.
lore.added: Lore added to your world bible.

graph.title: World graph
graph.subtitle: A read-only view of how your world’s lore connects.
